trades.reasoning: RSI has pushed into overbought territory (71.4) and score dropped to 75 — trimming to free cash for score-95 candidates still in healthy momentum zone.
Score 95 with RSI 68 (bullish zone, not overbought), MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — textbook momentum entry on a risk-on day.

decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ up 1.7% giving a green light for momentum entries. The portfolio is nearly fully deployed with only $170 cash, so I trimmed 10 shares of NSIT (RSI overbought at 71.4, score dropped to 75) to free up capital. Proceeds fund a new position in NVTS, which leads the screener at score 95 with RSI still comfortably in the bullish zone — the best risk-adjusted setup available today.

market_education.summary_en: Equity markets surged today with the NASDAQ jumping 1.7% as investor risk appetite returned in force. Tech and growth sectors led the rally, reflecting renewed confidence in AI-driven earnings and cooling macro concerns. The broad S&P 500 gained 0.8%, confirming the move was not isolated to mega-caps but spread across the market.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日強勁反彈，納斯達克指數大漲1.7%，投資者風險偏好明顯回升。科技股與成長股引領漲勢，反映市場對人工智能盈利前景的信心回升，加上宏觀面憂慮稍緩。標普500指數同步上揚0.8%，顯示此波升勢並非集中於大型股，而是全面擴散至不同板塊。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI (Relative Strength Index) above 70 signals that a stock has risen so fast that buyers may be exhausted — making a pullback more likely. It doesn't mean sell immediately, but it raises the bar: you need very strong conviction to hold or add. Today NSIT hit RSI 71.4, so we trimmed rather than let it run unchecked.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當RSI（相對強弱指數）超過70，代表股價升幅過急、買盤動能可能趨於疲乏，回調風險上升。這不代表必須即時賣出，但應提高持倉門檻——需要更強的基本面支撐才值得繼續持有。今日NSIT的RSI升至71.4，屬於超買訊號，故採取部分減持策略，鎖定部分利潤並轉投動能更健康的標的。
